what_was_done: Converted skill_server_v2.py from stdio to HTTP (streamable-http, port 8743). Added FP16 (.half()) + torch thread limits to skill_search.py. Added argparse, OAuth stubs, transport selection. Single shared process replaces per-instance stdio spawning.
known_issues: Gate 23: Go test naming too rigid — needs smarter _has_test_on_disk for Go packages
§8.2 Autonomous Mode Safety deferred (write-then-execute risk, verification_specialist unguarded subprocess)
Gate 14/20 redundancy: both check session_test_baseline, Gate 20 check is dead code
kg_to_obsidian.py generates underscore filenames for entities — causes graph duplication when project uses hyphens
MCP auth error when launching Claude Code from ~/.claude/hooks/ subdirectory
skill_server_v2 needs systemd/supervisor for auto-start on boot (currently manual nohup)
